scripts.test: doppler run --config dev -- sh -c 'NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation vitest run src/server src/har src/replay'
scripts.test:integration: doppler run --config dev -- sh -c 'NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation vitest run src/integration/recording-shapes.integration.test.ts src/integration/har-replay.integration.test.ts'
scripts.test:external: doppler run --config dev -- sh -c 'NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation vitest run src/integration/real-egress.integration.test.ts'
scripts.test:all: doppler run --config dev -- sh -c 'NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation vitest run'
